title: Five Nights at Freddy's Remastered (Fabric)
description: An adventure modpack for Five Nights at Freddy's where you can find animatronic structures and more! Explore the world of Five Nights at Freddy's Remastered.
body:
Five Nihts at Freddy´s Remastered Minecraft is an incredible game, and Five Nights at Freddy's is a horror masterpiece. But what happens when you merge them into one seamless, technical experience? This modpack is the definitive answer.
##  # 
This isn't just a simple texture swap; it’s a total overhaul designed to bring Scott Cawthon’s brand of terror into the open-world sandbox.
##  # 
What’s Inside? Over 100 Animatronic Variants: From the OG classics to Nightmare and Glamrock models. Each entity features unique AI designed to stalk and hunt you.
##  # 
New Survival Mechanics: Experience more than just basic crafting. We’ve integrated functional security cameras, power management systems, and specialized night events that turn your world into a true fight for survival.
##  # 
Infinite Creativity & Decor: Hundreds of new blocks, pizzeria props, and detailed furniture to build the ultimate Fazbear Entertainment location.
##  # 
World Structures: Explore abandoned pizzerias and hidden warehouses that generate naturally throughout your map.
##  # 
Peak Optimization: Carefully selected performance mods ensure smooth gameplay and high FPS, even when the animatronics start to swarm.
##  # 
Immersive Atmosphere: Custom ambient sounds, realistic fog, and enhanced lighting make every night feel like a real horror movie.
##  # 
Honestly, if you want the most complete, terrifying, and technical FNAF experience in Minecraft, this is your best option.
##  # 
Can you survive until 6:00 AM?

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

by Poteletubbie2245
